description: You are preparing a secure, ephemeral Virtual Machine for a private investigator who needs to temporarily retain browsing history across sessions to map out complex corporate registries. Configure Tor Browser to persistently record browsing history by disabling its amnesic Private Browsing features. To verify the configuration, visit 'https://check.torproject.org/' and 'https://duckduckgo.com/', then close the browser to ensure history databases are synced to disk.
